entries.note: Dharma can mean teaching, truth, or the way things are.
Sutras preserve teachings in compact, memorable form.
Zen emphasizes direct insight and practice.
The sangha is one of the Three Jewels.
Nirvana literally suggests blowing out or extinguishing.
Anatta denies a permanent, independent self.
Dukkha names the instability built into conditioned experience.
Karma concerns intentional action rather than simple fate.
Metta is goodwill cultivated toward oneself and others.
